title: Category:The Eleventh House
text: The Eleventh House in 1973 [1] The Eleventh House , was a jazz fusion band of the 1970s, led by Larry Coryell . References [ edit ] ↑ Larry Coryell & The Eleventh House | palatia Jazz - das internationale jazzfestival der pfalz an historischen spielorten (German), October 31, 2016
